S.S1: Positive alpha-synuclein biomarker in any tissue or fluid.

N.N2: Biomarker evidence of neurodegeneration such as abnormal DaTSCAN, NfL, or NM-MRI.

G.G1: Risk variants such as mild GBA1 or elevated polygenic burden.
G.G2: Causative variants such as LRRK2, severe GBA1, or SNCA copy-number gain.

examples.S0N1G2: Genetic PD without demonstrable synuclein evidence
